chapter_title.en: Traditional reports in condemnation of Waqifites

parts.text: وأما ما روي من الطعن على رواة الواقفة فأكثر من أن يحصى، وهو موجود في

text: كتب أصحابنا نحن نذكر طرفا منه:

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: As for reports, which has come in ridicule and condemnation of Waqifiya and which are present in the books of our scholars; they are much more than that which can be counted, therefore we have mentioned only some of them.
